rules.title: Avoid exaggerated or unverifiable performance claims
rules.guidance: Do not claim super suction, industrial-grade power, guaranteed deep clean or other unsupported performance statements.

rules.title: Electrical and USB-powered products need human review
rules.guidance: For USB rechargeable electrical products, verify supplier safety information, charging details and local compliance before launch.

rules.title: Counterfeit or IP-infringing goods are prohibited
rules.guidance: Reject listings that use protected brands, logos or misleading branded packaging without authorization.
